summary: Restore weekly timesheet detail as the primary expanded approval view and make project-scoped approval tasks clearer for admins.

notes: No database migration is included in this release.
Expanded review rows now show the timesheet day-by-project detail before the approval chain.
Project-scoped pending tasks are labeled as project blocks, while department summary tasks are labeled as weekly-sheet summary tasks.
Pending week dividers show task-node count and distinct timesheet count when one weekly sheet is split into multiple approval nodes.
Admin in-progress visibility wording no longer says 'not my turn'; it is labeled as visible flow that does not require action.
Mobile review cards use the same wording and expanded-detail ordering as desktop.

verification: Do not block deployment on local Playwright because production credentials are required; run production smoke after deployment.
After deploy, run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.3.
After deploy, run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against https://xpjs.asia/.
known_warnings: ESLint still reports existing warnings in dashboard/ui/TimesheetPage files, but exits 0.
Vite still warns that the main index chunk is larger than 500 kB.
